html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion

The Unrestrained Static appears in the Moonstorm after players defeat the Celestial Scion for the first time. It can be caught by Static Restrainer and turns into an Energetic Static that starts the Moonstorm Quest.

Wearing an Astroggles will show its direction in the Moonstorm.

Gallery

  • Unrestrained Static Indicator saw by wearing Astroggles.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion
Unrestrained Static
Miscellaneous
"moonstorm_static_roamer"
“It seems lost in transmission.”
–Wilson
“I have this urge to catch it.”
–Willow
“Cute little wandering spark!”
–Wolfgang
“Like a roaming little spirit.”
–Wendy
“UNCLAIMED POWER”
–WX-78
“That energy has gone astray.”
–Wickerbottom
“We should bottle that lightning!”
–Woodie
“Hmm, not your typical magic.”
–Maxwell
“The pöwer röams free.”
–Wigfrid
“We can catch it!”
–Webber
“It is free-range.”
–Warly
“Catch little fire!”
–Wormwood
“Hope it don't short somethin' or someone out!”
–Winona
“That juice is on the loose!”
–Wortox
“Watch me catch sparky stuff!”
–Wurt
“Woby, should we name it Sparky?”
–Walter
“Shall we bridle that energy?”
–Wanda
The Unrestrained Static appears in the Moonstorm after players defeat the Celestial Scion for the first time. It can be caught by Static Restrainer and turns into an Energetic Static that starts the Moonstorm Quest.
Wearing an Astroggles will show its direction in the Moonstorm.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Unrestrained Static Indicator saw by wearing Astroggles.

Tóm tắt

Nội dung này chỉ có sau khi kích hoạt Lunar Rift và đánh bại Celestial Scion
title: Unrestrained Static

The '''Unrestrained Static''' appears in the [[Moonstorm]] after players defeat the [[Celestial Scion]] for the first time. It can be caught by [[Static Restrainer]] and turns into an [[Energetic Static]] that starts the Moonstorm Quest.

Wearing an [[Astroggles]] will show its direction in the Moonstorm.
